name: kram
description: Kram monorepo with Node.js TypeScript backend and Flutter frontend

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:deploy: npm run build:frontend:deploy && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.clean: npm run clean:backend && npm run clean:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && cd frontend && flutter pub get

author: Namit Thakral
